race.comment: ERNIEGY (2) fought on for second last start over 1400m at Dubbo, making it three minor placings in a row. Goes up a rung or two but he is up to the task. FORTHEO (3) is still a maiden after 10 starts. Managed to find the placings at Muswellbrook two starts back before finishing sixth over 1400m at Tamworth last start. Likely to be about the money. MICROGRAVITY (5) will find this a little easier than his second on debut three weeks ago, beaten 0.8 lengths at the end of 1280m at Muswellbrook. Will benefit from that experience so another top-three finish is on the cards. PRIMA VECCHIO (8) is facing the starter for the first time but hails from an astute yard and a watch on betting is advised.
